title: Inclusive Enchanting
description: Allows enchantments to go on extra items
body:
Allows some enchantments to go on extra items.  

**New Possibilities**  
- Crossbow: flame and punch  
- Bow: piercing, quick charge  
- Tools: fire aspect (acts as auto smelt)  
- Shield: knock back  
- Trident: piercing, power, quick charge  
  
**Incompatible**  
- flame / piercing / multishot  
- fire aspect / fortune / silk touch  
- quick charge / power / impaling  

### Credits

- The 1.16.5 version was commissioned by Dynam0
- The 1.19 port was done by [FnControlOption](https://www.curseforge.com/members/fncontroloption/projects)
